questions.question: What is the mystery Paul says was revealed to him?
options: That Gentiles are fellow heirs with Israel in Christ
The location of the lost tribes
questions.answer: That Gentiles are fellow heirs with Israel in Christ

questions.question: Paul prays that believers would be rooted and grounded in what?
Paul says God is able to do immeasurably more than all we ask or imagine.
Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or _____, according to the power that works in us.
To know the love of Christ which surpasses _____, that you may be filled with all the fullness of God.
